# Traps
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Traps&prop=wikitext

traps are the ability of the huntress, they often paralyze or slow enemies as the quiver does, but in an area of effect and less damage

== Production Traps ==
'''''For production Traps please follow this [https://www.realmeye.com/wiki/traps link].'''''

==Custom {{PAGENAME}}==
{|
| {{ItemDisplay|A trap made of cookies|a}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Arcane Bait|h}}
| {{ItemDisplay|A Precious Rock|h}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Flesh Trap|p}}
|}
===Starforce {{PAGENAME}}===
{|
| {{ItemDisplay|Blackhole Trap|g}}
|}
